name: X-Golf Grand Rapids
about: X-Golf Grand Rapids is an indoor golf venue featuring state-of-the-art golf simulators with high accuracy and realism. The facility uses a combination of camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors to provide players with advanced gameplay. It offers multiple simulator bays, PGA instruction, and a full restaurant and bar, making it suitable for both casual play and serious training. Pricing is per simulator, per hour, accommodating up to six people per bay with discounts available for certain groups on weekdays.
why_golfers_like_it: Unparalleled accuracy and realism with advanced camera systems and infrared lasers
PGA instruction and personalized coaching with real-time ball-flight data and video analysis
Full-service restaurant and bar with a variety of food and beverage options

food_and_drink.notes: Shareable bites, delicious appetizers, snacks, pizzas and more. Full kitchen available with a downloadable menu.
Full bar with beer by the glass or on tap, cocktails and wines.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available on-site, but you are welcome to bring your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, X-Golf Grand Rapids has an on-site restaurant and bar where you can purchase food and beverages. Outside food and drink are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Generally, it takes about one hour for an individual player to play 18 holes. If you have more than one player, you may want to book an additional hour for each player in your group, though skill level can affect the pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf welcomes children of all ages and is a great place for families to play and host events.
